# A Heading

A paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, and `inline code`. Plus a [[Wiki Link]] and
a [Markdown link](https://example.com).

## Section Two

A list:

- item one
- item two with `code` and a [[Page Link]]
  - nested
- item three

A code block:

```ts
const wikilink = "[[Not A Real Link]]"; // inside code, must not be detected
```

A blockquote:

> Quote with a [[Quoted Wiki Link]] inside.

A table:

| Col A | Col B |
| ----- | ----- |
| 1     | 2     |
| 3     | 4     |

The end.
